excerpt: When the government blocks a research team’s work, one of its scientists seeks alternative avenues and finds himself entangled with shadowy figures.
title: The Risk

excerpt: A novelist helps an alien girl and her alien cat retrieve weapon parts needed to defeat an alien monster possessing humans.
title: The Cat

excerpt: Fearless cop Chow Yun-Fat closes in on gun-runner Anthony Wong who’s moving in on another boss’s turf, while assassin Tony Leung Chiu-wai is caught in the middle.
title: Hard Boiled

excerpt: Nightclub singer Barbara Stanwyck hides out with a houseful of encyclopedia-writing professors and falls for the youngest of the bunch, Gary Cooper.
title: Ball of Fire

excerpt: In gold-rush-era San Francisco, ruthless casino boss Edward G. Robinson covets new arrival Miriam Hopkins, who falls for poetry-spouting prospector Joel McCrea.
title: Barbary Coast
